mapper.sql: SELECT dr.id, dr.register_id, dr.medical_technology_id, dr.disposal_info, dr.disposal_position, dr.disposal_remark, dr.disposal_state, dr.disposal_result, dr.disposal_time, dr.creation_time, dr.disposal_employee_id, dr.inputdisposal_employee_id, r.case_number, r.real_name AS patient_name, mt.tech_name, mt.tech_code FROM disposal_request dr INNER JOIN register r ON r.id = dr.register_id INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = dr.medical_technology_id
mapper.select: WHERE dr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY dr.creation_time DESC, dr.id DESC
WHERE dr.disposal_state = #{disposalState} ORDER BY dr.creation_time ASC, dr.id ASC
WHERE dr.disposal_state = '待处置' ORDER BY dr.creation_time ASC, dr.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE disposal_request SET disposal_state = #{disposalState} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE disposal_request SET disposal_result = #{disposalResult}, disposal_state = #{disposalState}, disposal_time = #{disposalTime}, disposal_remark = #{disposalRemark}, inputdisposal_employee_id = #{inputdisposalEmployeeId} WHERE id = #{id}
